title: SSE stream discards last_event_id returned by parse_sse_block
description: client.rs subscribe_events(): parse_sse_block() returns (SseEvent, Option<String>) where the second element is the id: line value. The caller binds it as _id and discards it. The stream never exposes the last event ID to the caller, making RFC 8620 §7.3 reconnection with Last-Event-ID impossible via the public API. A reconnecting caller always sends no Last-Event-ID, so the server cannot resume from the last seen event.
